ocr_findings.description: Section heading: image shows '●● 処理の実行後に条件を判断する「do」' but OCR renders '○ 处理の実行後に条件を判断する「do」' — two errors: (1) bullet icon '●●' misread as '○'; (2) '処理' rendered with simplified Chinese character '处理' instead of Japanese '処理'. The kanji substitution could cause downstream parsing issues.
The do-loop flowchart diagram (process box above condition diamond) replaced with img-0.jpeg reference — expected figure behavior.
The 書式 label and プログラム例 label appear inside code fences in OCR ('```txt\n書式 繰返し処理（do）\n```') rather than as styled box labels. Low impact on meaning.

reviewer_notes: Page covers the 'do' loop construct (do-while variant). All prose explanations, the do/while syntax block, three bullet points, and the ☆-output プログラム例 code block are faithfully captured. The simplified Chinese character '处理' substituted for '処理' in the heading is the main concern — this is a recurring CJK lookalike confusion. The superscript ruby 'ド' annotation above 'do' is not captured but is cosmetic.
